description_long: This is a two-story, weathered house with a flat roof and a partially open upper floor. The exterior walls are made of aged, cracked concrete with visible patches of exposed brickwork, giving it a distressed, urban appearance. The front facade features a blue wooden door, three small windows above the door, and a larger window to the right, all with worn frames. The upper floor has large, rectangular window openings without glass, allowing a clear view of the wooden floor inside. The house lacks a roof covering, exposing the interior to the elements, and the paint on the walls is faded and peeling. The overall structure suggests a utilitarian, possibly abandoned or under-renovation urban dwelling.
description: A weathered, two-story concrete house with a flat roof, exposed brick patches, and large open windows on the upper floor. The front features a blue door and a mix of small and large windows, all showing signs of age and neglect.
description_view_0: Front view showing a blue door, three small upper windows, and a large window to the right, with visible wall damage and exposed brick.
description_view_1: Side view with a large blue garage-style door and two upper window openings, highlighting more exposed brick and wall cracks.
description_view_2: Rear view with two large upper window openings and extensive wall weathering, lacking any doors or lower windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no doors or windows on the lower level, and two upper window openings, showing the most extensive wall damage and exposed brick.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular openings on the upper floor
attribute_entryway_design: Simple blue wooden door with no porch or overhang, flanked by small windows and a large window, all with minimal decorative elements.
